sourceList.label: SpawningTool replay browser

downloadSupport.notes: Direct replay URLs follow /<id>/download/ and listing pages expose /zip/ endpoints.

limitations: cohort labels still need manual or secondary metadata review
listing pages alone do not provide reliable MMR buckets

sourceList.label: SpawningTool replay packs

downloadSupport.notes: File links can be converted to direct Google Drive downloads; folder links remain discovery-oriented in the first implementation.

limitations: folder links are not fully automated in the first implementation
packs require post-download filtering by matchup and player

sourceList.label: SC2ReplayStats public site

downloadSupport.notes: A stable public download endpoint was not verified in this research pass.

recommendedUse: future automation candidate after manual verification
limitations: direct public replay download path not confirmed
do not rely on this source for batch downloading yet
